top_signals.title: Multistrat Hedge Fund Paloma to Cut Teams in Latest Pivot
top_signals.summary: Donald Sussman, the veteran behind Paloma Partners, is pivoting his long-standing multistrategy hedge fund to focus on fewer managers in which he has the highest conviction as the firm adjusts to a decline in assets over the past three years.

top_signals.title: Baltic Dry Index falls to 2840 down 89 points
top_signals.summary: Today, Thursday, July 16 2026, the Baltic Dry Index decreased by 89 points, reaching 2840 points. Baltic Dry Index is compiled by the London-based Baltic Exchange and covers prices for transported cargo such as coal, grain and iron ore. The index is based on a daily survey of agents all over the world. Baltic Dry ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
